es.title: Plancha Pushup
instructions: Colocate en una postura estable y alineada.
Activá abdomen y glúteos antes de iniciar.
Sostené la posición manteniendo respiración controlada.
Terminá el ejercicio sin perder la alineación corporal.
tips: Respirá de forma controlada sin perder la postura.
common_mistakes: Contener el aire de forma excesiva
benefits: Mejora la estabilidad del core y el control postural.

en.title: Plank Pushup
en.description: Exercise primarily focused on the chest.
instructions: Set up in a stable, aligned position.
Brace the abdominals and glutes before starting.
Hold the position while breathing under control.
Finish the exercise without losing alignment.
tips: Breathe under control without losing posture.
Keep the pelvis and ribcage aligned.
benefits: Improves core stability and postural control.
